creator: philippe.michel7@free.fr
text:
The recent llvm-devel using a 3.9 snapshot seems to be build statically and is about 4 times larger that it used to.

This was not the case with the 3.8 snapshots and with the various llvm3x/clang3x ports.

Would it be possible to have it built using dynamic libraries again ? And if not maybe having a warning that it needs about 900 MB to install and 3 GB or so to compile.
